videos.title: HTML Iframe Tutorial - Everything You Need to Know
videos.description: Complete guide to HTML iframes covering src, srcdoc, sandbox, responsive design, and security best practices.

videos.title: JavaScript postMessage Tutorial - Cross-Origin Communication
videos.description: Learn how to use window.postMessage for secure cross-origin communication between windows and iframes.

videos.title: Iframe Security: Sandbox, CSP, and X-Frame-Options
videos.description: Deep dive into iframe security including the sandbox attribute, Content Security Policy, and clickjacking prevention.

videos.title: Build a Dashboard with Cross-Frame Communication
videos.description: Full project tutorial building a multi-widget dashboard where iframes communicate with a central hub using postMessage.

videos.title: Responsive Iframes: CSS Techniques
videos.description: Kevin Powell demonstrates multiple CSS techniques for creating responsive iframes, including padding trick and aspect-ratio.

videos.title: Content Security Policy Explained
videos.description: Comprehensive explanation of CSP including frame-src, frame-ancestors, and how to properly configure them for iframe security.

videos.title: Advanced Iframe Techniques and Patterns
videos.description: Advanced patterns for using iframes including dynamic resizing, performance optimization, and embedding third-party widgets.
